title: viola purpurea var. aurea
intro: Viola purpurea var. aurea, also known as the golden violet, is a flowering plant that belongs to the viola genus. The golden violet has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of the golden violet include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Golden violet can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
